description: Design and ship a minimal inter-surface messaging primitive for c11. Filesystem-contract-first mailbox at $C11_STATE/mailboxes/ with a shared _outbox/, per-surface inboxes, and pluggable delivery handlers (stdin, silent, watch, potentially exec). XML-tag wire format for PTY injection. Topic discovery via hybrid advertised+emergent registry. CLI is a thin convenience wrapper; direct file writes are equivalent. See design doc at docs/c11-messaging-primitive-design.md.

relationships_out.note: Both touch the per-surface manifest/metadata layer (CMUX-11). C11-13 extends pane metadata with mailbox fields (delivery, subscribe, retention, advertises); CMUX-37's WorkspaceApplyPlan will absorb these as structured fields when Blueprints/Snapshots land. C11-13 ships independently without blocking on CMUX-37; manifest field namespace chosen so Blueprint serialization composes cleanly.

title: Inter-agent messaging primitive: mailbox + pluggable delivery handlers
